name: Mock Turkey
recipeInstructions:
1. Pour the hot water over the rolled oats.
2. Add the rest of the ingredients to the oats and mix well.
3. Oil a baking pan.
4. Shape the mixture into the form of a turkey, using celery stalks for the legs and small oblongs for the wings.
5. Pat oil over the outside of the shaped mixture.
6. Bake in a moderate oven until done in the middle, approximately 45 minutes.
7. Loosen with a spatula and transfer to a meat platter.
8. Garnish and serve hot. Serves 4 to 6.
